What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A bald man with a mustache wearing a grey suit holds a white binder while gesturing with his right hand. A woman with long dark hair in a red top and gold necklace sits among other guests, including a man with a goatee and a blonde woman, and turns her head to speak while looking to her right. A grey text logo reading Dr. Phil appears in the bottom left corner.
